race.comment: EXIT (11) has been tackling some of the top fillies of late, chasing Sheza Alibi & Sass Appeal her past couple. This is a fair bit easier, she can bounce back and shapes as one of the hardest to  beat. WISE INLAW (6) comes through a handy race against the older horses when closing well., he maps beautifully here and should be peaking third up. CAFE AU LAIT (9) was dominant when last seen at Pakenham and has to be respected given the ease of that victory. CHOWDOWN (10) won his maiden fresh as favourite and profiles as if he can go on with it.
